title: festuca michelii
intro: Festuca michelii, also known as Michel's fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Festuca michelii include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a potential treatment for various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture or infused in oil to create a topical cream for external use.
